div.div:
Use the smallest validation lane that still covers the touched scope.
If the work broadens, split the issue or update scope before continuing.
For AWS-specific behavior, check AWS Knowledge before editing assumptions that can drift over time.
A worktree is not finished until the PR exists, issue evidence is posted, and merge/closeout is complete.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(59, 162, 114), rgb(53, 141, 100)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 162, 114), rgb(53, 141, 100));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 140px; margin-left: 830px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
